comment_model: Dynamic Spatial-Temporal Aware Graph Neural Network for Traffic Flow Forecasting (ICML 2022)
comment_paper: Lan et al. ICML 2022. Reference: https://github.com/SYLan2019/DSTAGNN
comment_architecture_parameters: These parameters control the model architecture
comment_in_channels: Input feature dimension (usually 1 for traffic speed/flow)
comment_nb_block: Number of DSTAGNN blocks (stacked residual blocks). Paper default: 4
comment_K: Order of Chebyshev polynomials for graph convolution. Paper default: 3
comment_nb_chev_filter: Output channels from Chebyshev graph convolution. Paper default: 32
comment_nb_time_filter: Output channels from temporal convolution (GTU). Paper default: 32
comment_d_model: Attention model dimension for temporal and spatial attention. Paper default: 512
comment_d_k: Key/query/value dimension in attention layers. Paper default: 32
comment_n_heads: Number of attention heads. Paper default: 3 (must divide d_model evenly)
comment_graph: Graph type to use. 'G'=static adjacency matrix, 'AG'=adaptive graph learning. Paper default: AG
comment_time_strides: Temporal stride in the first DSTAGNN block. Paper default: 1
comment_d_v: Value dimension in attention layers. Paper default: 32 (same as d_k)
comment_input_window: Input time sequence length (look-back window). Paper default: 12 (PEMS datasets)
comment_output_window: Output prediction horizon length. Paper default: 12 (PEMS datasets)
comment_learning_rate: Initial learning rate for Adam optimizer. Paper default: 0.0001
comment_lr_decay: Whether to apply learning rate decay during training
comment_clip_grad_norm: Whether to apply gradient clipping to prevent exploding gradients
comment_use_early_stop: Whether to use early stopping based on validation loss
comment_scaler: Feature scaling method: standard (z-score), minmax, etc.
comment_load_external: Whether to load external features (e.g., POI, weather)
comment_ext_scaler: Scaler for external features if load_external=true
comment_add_time_in_day: Whether to add time-of-day features (hour embeddings)
comment_reduced_capacity: For memory-limited scenarios, use these settings:
comment_reduced_setup: nb_block=2, nb_chev_filter=16, nb_time_filter=16, d_model=256, d_k=16, n_heads=2, batch_size=16
comment_datasets: Recommended datasets: PEMS03, PEMS04, PEMS07, PEMS08
comment_io_format: Input: (batch_size, T_in=12, N_nodes, F_in=1). Output: (batch_size, T_out=12, N_nodes, 1)
